titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD 4.1.Sacr.8

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=61 status=live modified=2022-09-14 02:05:17.782716+00 | translation moa=62 status=live modified=2022-09-14 01:40:43.403657+00

div.p:
Notum sit Omnibus presens scriptum inspecturis . quod Ego Willelmus Cumin . et heredes
mei dedimus . et concessimus . deo . et sancto cuthberto . ad lumen ecclesie sancti cuthberti .
in perpetuam elemosinam . unam petram cere reddundam annuatim ad festum
sancti cuthberti . in septembri . Et ut donacio ista rata . et inconcussa perma
neat  ego Willelmus Cumin . sigilli mei apposicione corroboraui . his testibus .
Ricardo filio . et herede meo . dauid de graham . Rogero persona de Rule . et aliis pluribus

Let it be known to all who shall inspect the present written deed that I, William Comyn, and my heirs, have given and conceded to God and to Saint Cuthbert, for the light of the church of Saint Cuthbert, in perpetual alms, one stone of wax to be rendered annually at the feast of Saint Cuthbert in September. And so that this donation remain established and steadfast, I, William Comyn, have strengthened it by the application of my seal. With these witnesses: Richard my son and heir, David Graham, Roger the parson of Rule, and many others.
